PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Leestma for Keith Williams, Sr. (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it did not receive any opposition and that no one appeared in Court. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to receipt of the order). Bond is waived. Mr. Leestma is to provide a revised order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.
